name: fill-gaps-v1-m4-release-readiness
description: Harden operations, finalize documentation, and validate release readiness for adoption.

userStories.title: Update webhook operations runbook and observability checklist
userStories.description: As on-call, I want clear operational playbooks so webhook failures can be diagnosed and replayed quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/webhook-operations-runbook.md with replay, dead-letter triage, and common failure signatures
Document required log and metric fields for troubleshooting and verify coverage in tests where practical
Align operational guidance with latest default effects and adapter behavior

userStories.title: Publish release notes and upgrade guidance
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want release guidance so adopters can migrate to the new setup with predictable steps.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/release-notes-and-upgrade-guide.md with Sequelize adapter and default effects setup
Publish a parity delta table showing which Pay gaps were closed in v1
Document known limitations and compatibility notes for unresolved items

userStories.title: Execute release candidate validation checklist
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a final validation pass so we can ship with confidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Run and record full validation suite including bun run typecheck, bun run lint, and bun test
Verify example smoke flow at scripts/example-app/smoke.ts against documented setup
Capture final sign-off checklist in project docs under projects/fill-gaps-v1
